title: NeoPackages registry
description: Schema for registry.json — the package index consumed by the `neo` CLI (https://github.com/NeoHaskell/neocli). The CLI fetches this file, looks up each bare dependency from `neo.json` in `packages`, picks the highest version satisfying the constraint, and resolves it to a git URL + SHA.

packages.description: Map of package name → metadata. The package name is the key used in `neo.json` dependencies.

propertyNames.description: Lowercase package name. Letters, digits, `.`, `_`, `-`. Must start with a letter or digit.

description.description: Human-readable one-line description shown in errors/listings.

repository.description: Git URL of the package. Passed verbatim to `cabal.project` as `source-repository-package`/git location. Example: `https://github.com/NeoHaskell/some-package`.

versions.description: Map of semver version → resolved git ref. Keys must be valid semver (parsed by `nodejs_semver::Version`).

sha.description: Full or short git SHA (7–40 hex chars) the version resolves to. Used as the git rev when fetching the package.

tag.description: Upstream git tag this version corresponds to (e.g. `v1.2.3`). Informational — `sha` is the source of truth for the build.
